facebook.caption:
POV: you're on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and you almost walk past Sugar Fusion Bakery.

Don't.

4.7 stars. 262 reviews. A bakery on Phu Quoc that actually delivers. Fresh bakes, a real café vibe, and a break from beach food you didn't know you needed.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Fresh out of the oven at Sugar Fusion Bakery. 4.7 stars, 262 reviews, and a line that tells you everything. Your Phu Quoc itinerary has a new stop.

instagram.caption:
